expectations.text: Output starts with '# 審查' header identifying translation-bias.md
Output ends with a summary table with | 檢查 | 結果 | format
expectations.evidence: Summary table present with | 檢查 | 結果 | format listing all 10 checks with counts.

expectations.text: Summary includes total issue count and check count
expectations.evidence: Summary lists specific counts per check (4+1+3+6+2+1 = 17 items). '主要問題說明' section explains 4 key issues.

expectations.text: Report does NOT auto-fix any content
expectations.evidence: All findings are reports only. Suggestions use '建議' not direct edits.

eval_feedback.overall: All assertions pass. Report is well-structured with proper Chinese format and comprehensive analysis.
